name: Chunky Kidney Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the beans by hand, using a fork or the back of a wooden spoon.
2. Blend in the sour cream, mixing until smooth.
3. Add all the other ingredients and blend well.
4. Cover and chill.
Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Polish Sausage, Celery, Corn Crackers
